calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Lawrence J. Less, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Layla Durrani, a minor, through her Guardian ad Litem Amina Durrani. Both the minor and her Guardian ad Litem were placed under oath and examined.
Plaintiff Brita Yasmin Durrani was unable to attend today's hearing, but if necessary was willing to appear via telephone.
No appearance by defendants Baluinnyam Tsend Ayush or Babileg Gurragchaa.
Defaults were entered against defendants on January 6, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 26, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Brita Yasmin Durrani and Layla Durrani, a minor, through her Guardian ad Litem Amina Durrani, and against the Defaulted Defendants Baluinnyam Tsend Ayush and Batbileg Gurragchaa as follows:

Damages/Principal - Plaintiff Brita yasmin Durrani - $1,582,000.00.
Damages/Principal - Plaintiff Layla Durrani - $758,100.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
